= Wiki Places =
Places on the wiki that have food info
* [[Home_Base#The_Gene_Room]]
* [[Consumables#Food]]

= [[Bharata]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Assam Milk Tea}}||+20 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Rice and Curry}}||+30 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Tandoori Chicken}}||+15 Food
|}

= [[Britland]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Crabby Burger}}||+50k Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Darjeeling Tea}}||+20 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Fish and Chips}}||+20 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Stargazy Pie}}||+20 Food
|}

= [[Cathay]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Bean}}||+15 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Du Kang Wine}}||+15 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Pear}}||+20 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Sichuan Beef}}||+50 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Yangzhou Fried Rice}}||+50 Food
|}

= [[Clown Express]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Big Plate Chicken Burger}}||+20 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Buddha's Temptation Burger}}||+20 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Lamb Paomo Burger}}||+20 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Spicy Ducks Blood Burger}}||+20 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Spicy Lung Pieces Burger}}||+20 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Stinky Tofu Burger}}||+? Food
|}

= [[Hellas]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Moussaka}}||+25 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Olive}}||+20 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Souvlaki}}||+15 Food
|}

= [[Home Base]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Crow Sashimi}}||+1000 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Elephant's Meat}}||+1200/+2000 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Escargot}}||+1000 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Fungus}}||+50 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Giraffe's Meat}}||+1200 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Pie from Heaven}}||+1000 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Red Fruit}}||+1000 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Shrimp Cracker}}||+50 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Snail Ramen}}||+60 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Soybean Paste Stew}}||+50 Food
|}

= [[Kemet]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Freaked Fish}}||+10 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Kushari}}||+15 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Roast Pigeon}}||+20 Food
|}

= [[Koryeo]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Fish Cake}}||+30 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Koryeon BBQ}}||+40 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Spicy Cabbage}}||+20 Food
|}

= [[Murika]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Hamburger}}||+20 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Peanut}}||+40 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Sweet Potato}}||+30 Food
|}

= [[Parsia]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Charcoal-Roasted Camel}}||+15 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Date Fruit}}||+10 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Hamster Pistachios}}||+15 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Parsian Tea}}||+5 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Pomegranate Braised Fowl}}||+10 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Saffron Ice Cream}}||+5 Food
|}

= [[Time Rift]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Nutrient Paste}}||+40 Food
|}

= [[Yamato]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Dorayaki}}||+25 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Oden}}||+45 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Sushi}}||+40 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Uchi Matcha}}||+35 Food
|}

= (Unknown) =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Chinese Burger}}||+50 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Donkey Burger}}||+50 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Energy Pill}}||+60 Food
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Takoyaki}}||+50 Food
|}


[[Category:Icons]]
